description.ko: 비와 네온 사인을 통해 미래 도시의 디지털 로맨스를 묘사한, 우울하면서도 활기찬 도시 풍경입니다.
description.en: A melancholic yet vibrant cityscape depicting the digital romance of a futuristic city through rain and neon light.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Ultraviolet Arteries.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta neon and #00FFFF cyan holographic data streams through a heavy downpour. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through a dense, smoky volumetric atmosphere. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections on wet metallic asphalt, and lens flares from flickering neon signs. 8k resolution, capturing the romantic soul of a futuristic metropolis.
